title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Parle Products

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Parle Products
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
